meta.title: From JUKE to JOINT
meta.message: Ryan Coogler's film _Sinners_ follows twin brothers Smoke and Stack (both played by Michael B. Jordan) who return to 1932 Jim Crow Mississippi to open a juke joint, only to have the whole thing go sideways when vampires show up. It's a thriller, history lesson and a paean to the power of music — and utterly mesmerizing from start to finish. It pulled in 16 Oscar nominations, more than any film in history. I would vote for it for most of them, if anyone cared to give me a ballot. (You might remember a [SMOKE → STACK Raddle](/2025/12/24) from December, which is why I went for JUKE → JOINT here.)
